rationale: The cited paper appears only once, in a grouped citation in the identification section, where it is used as general precedent for using individual fixed effects to handle unobserved heterogeneity. The citing article does not engage Narayanan and Nair (2013)'s core contribution on fixed-effects bias correction in installed-base models, nor does it reuse that specific estimator or empirical setup. This functions as broad background support rather than a distinct, paper-specific building block.
